entitlements.categoryLegalLiteral: Vehicles up to 3,500 kg Maximum Authorised Mass (MAM) with up to 8 passenger seats and driver (with a trailer up to 750 kg). Can also tow heavier trailers if the total weight of vehicle and trailer isn't more than 3,500 kg. Provisional category B licences have no entitlement to tow a trailer. Physically disabled drivers with provisional category B entitlement will also have provisional entitlement to ride category A1 or A motor tricycles. Able-bodied drivers can no longer ride motor tricycles with a provisional category B licence
entitlements.categoryShortLiteral: Car with trailer up to 750 kg

entitlements.categoryLegalLiteral: Motor vehicles with fewer than 4 wheels with a maximum design speed exceeding 45 kilometres per hour (km/h) but not exceeding 50 km/h and which, if propelled by an internal combustion engine, has a cylinder capacity not exceeding 50 cc

2-wheel vehicles or 3-wheel vehicles with a maximum design speed of over 25km/h and not more than 45km/h; Light quadricycles with a mass in running order of not more than 425kg, not including the mass of the batteries in the case of electric vehicles, whose maximum design speed is over 25km/h and not more than 45km/h
